title: Itorero rishya ryatangiye mu Field y'Iburasirazuba
summary:
Itangizwa ry’itorero rishya mu Field y’Iburasirazuza ni intambwe ikomeye igaragaza ukwaguka kw’umurimo w’Imana mu bice bishya by’igihugu. Ni igikorwa cyuzuyemo ibyishimo n’icyizere cy’ahazaza heza h’ivugabutumwa.

Ni umwanya wo guha abaturage amahirwe yo kwegerana, gusenga no gusabana mu bumwe.

Iri torero rizaba ahantu ho kwigira hamwe ijambo ry’Imana no gukura mu buryo bw’umwuka.

Rizafasha abantu kubaka ubumwe, urukundo n’imibanire myiza hagati yabo.

Abayobozi n’abavugabutumwa bagize uruhare rukomeye mu gutangiza iri torero.

Ni igikorwa kigaragaza ubwitange n’icyerekezo cyo kugeza ubutumwa ku bantu benshi kurushaho.

Abaturage bahawe icyizere gishya n’umwanya wo gusenga hamwe.

Iri torero rizagira uruhare mu guhindura imiryango binyuze mu nyigisho n’amasengesho.

Ni intangiriro y’iterambere ry’ivugabutumwa mu gace k’Iburasirazuza.

Bigaragaza ko umurimo w’Imana ukomeje kwaguka no kugera kure.
author: Ibiro by'Ubutumwa
